title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0

synopsis: Yuta Okkotsu is a nervous high school student who is suffering from a serious problem—his childhood friend Rika has turned into a curse and won't leave him alone. Since Rika is no ordinary curse, his plight is noticed by Satoru Gojo, a teacher at Jujutsu High, a school where fledgling exorcists learn how to combat curses. Gojo convinces Yuta to enroll, but can he learn enough in time to confront the curse that haunts him? (Source: VIZ Media)

synonyms: Fool's Paradise
偶像事變 ～鴿子聽不見悲鳴～
synopsis: Hiiragi Sera, the most popular idol in Japan, was seriously injured during a live performance, losing one of her legs to an explosive device. The whole country was outraged by the news. Because of the manner and brutality of the attack, everyone suspected Hitoya Ittaka, a boy who was caught several years earlier, when he was just 13, for a series of bombings that killed several hundred people. As the fans' "love" for Sera turns into "hatred," Japan itself is changed...... But what is the truth? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

synonyms: Lazy Sigh of Villain Daughter
The Villainous Daughter's Lazy Sigh
악역영애의 나태한 한숨
synopsis: I was reincarnated as a villainess from an otome game I was playing. At this rate, I'll be exiled for being in the heroine’s way of conquering love. However, in this world… there are no entertainment materials! No doujinshis, no otome games, no smartphone! I'm really bored! Of course, I should be avoiding the destructive bad end… but before that I’m going to die from boredom! "If there's no entertainment, just create it!" Using the knowledge from my past life to create toys and romance novels, I'll make this boring world fun! After becoming the queen’s favorite entrepreneur, I thought this scenario change will bring me to my wonderful future… .but now the novel I wrote has brought me to the destruction flag--!?

title: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleRomaji: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Daini no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
titleEnglish: My Isekai Life: I Gained a Second Character Class and Became the Strongest Sage in the World!
titleNative: 転生賢者の異世界ライフ ～第二の職業を得て、世界最強になりました～
synonyms: Tensei Kenja no Isekai Life: Dai-2 no Shokugyo wo Ete, Sekai Saikyou ni Narimashita
Mein Isekai-Leben – Mit der Hilfe von Schleimen zum mächtigsten Magier einer anderen Welt
เกิดใหม่ในต่างโลกเป็นปราชญ์แกร่งสุดโดยไม่รู้ตัว
Life as a Reincarnated Sage in Another World ~Gaining a Second Profession and Becoming the Strongest in the World~
Réincarné dans un autre monde
Моє життя в Ісекаї
synopsis: Whether at the office or at home, corporate drone Yuji Sano works all the time. So when his home PC flashes a message about him being summoned to another world, Yuji restarts his machine...only to find that he's inadvertently accepted the summons! Now in a fantasy world far removed from paperwork and computers, Yuji has just one thing on his mind: waking up from what he thinks is a dream and getting back to the mountain of work he left behind! But this other world has other plans for Yuji, who quickly discovers his Monster Tamer character class allows him to befriend slimes! And thanks to their number, those slimes help him absorb so much magical knowledge that he gains a second character class in the blink of an eye! How will Yuji wield his power now that he's the greatest sage the realm has ever known?! And what about all that paperwork?! (Source: Square Enix)

title: TSUYOSHI: Daremo Katenai, Aitsu ni wa
titleRomaji: TSUYOSHI: Daremo Katenai, Aitsu ni wa
titleNative: TSUYOSHI 誰も勝てない、アイツには
synonyms: TSUYOSHI
TSUYOSHI: The one who no one can win against
Tsuyoshi ไอ้หนุ่มหมัดพิฆาตลูกป๋องแป๋ง
synopsis: Tsuyoshi Kawabata is just a regular convenience store employee in a mid-sized city west of Tokyo. Except... he also happens to be the most powerful fighter in the world. Although he doesn't particularly want to fight, his reputation precedes him, and martial artists come from all over the world to test their might against the mythical Tsuyoshi – and invariably end up handily beaten, clutching their battered family jewels in a convenience store parking lot. Should you wish to fight him, he has three rules to minimize inconvenience: 1) You only get one fight. There will be no rematch. 2) You will fight in a secluded area, where you won't be seen. 3) You will tell nobody about it – even if you lose.

title: Urushi Uruhashi
titleRomaji: Urushi Uruhashi
titleNative: うるしうるはし
synopsis: Mihiro Kanayama is a third-year high school student who aspires to become a lacquerware craftsman. He is given a challenge by his grandfather, who tells him to "create a piece while thinking about the person who would use it." He didn't know how to go about it, until he meets Tsumugi Fukaya, a woman working at an inn. Pure emotions bloom within a young man dedicated to traditional craftsmanship. Though he may be clumsy in his first attempts, you will come to admire his determined perseverance! (Source: Manga Cross, translated)

synopsis: It's been 25 years since Earth was invaded by beings from another realm. Now, everyone's life is shaped by a single measure of strength—the World Ranking. From the countryside of Gunma comes Kinoko Kino, a high school girl with zero communication skills, trembling her way through city life with just one dream: to make a friend. Little does she know... she's actually the World Ranking's #1: UNKNOWN! (Source: Shueisha, translated)

title: Gal no Jitensha wo Naoshitara Natsukareta
titleRomaji: Gal no Jitensha wo Naoshitara Natsukareta
titleNative: ギャルの自転車を直したら懐かれた
synonyms: When I Repaired a Gal's Bicycle, She Became Attached to Me
synopsis: Kutsuzawa Yasuo is a gloomy loner with zero friends. As he walks home alone like always, he has a chance encounter with the class’s top-tier beauty a popular gyaru admired by everyone! After helping her when she nearly falls and fixing her bicycle, he plans to quietly leave... but she looks at him with sparkling eyes instead. A gloomy introvert and a cheerful extrovert who were never supposed to cross paths yet somehow, they begin to grow closer. Thus begins an awkward but heartwarming youthful romantic comedy between two opposites.

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleRomaji: Jirai nan desu ka? Chihara-san
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
Jirai Nandesuka? Chihara-san
Chihara, es-tu une Jirai ?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Caught by the Villain
titleRomaji: Agyeogege Jeongchereul Deulkyeobeoryeotda
titleNative: 악역에게 정체를 들켜버렸다
synonyms: The Villain Discovered My Identity
I was discovered by the villain
被反派识破了身份
反派皇子識破我的真面目
ถูกองค์ชายตัวร้ายจับได้ซะแล้ว
En las Manos del Villano
Le Chant de la Lune
synopsis: A lifetime as a fencing prodigy prepared Eunha for her new role as Selena Evan, novel side character and daughter of a renowned swordsman. Life isn't actually so bad after being sucked into a fictional world, but she’s doomed to meet an untimely death if she can't escape the clutches of the villainous Prince Ignus. When Selena's twin brother, Celestine, runs away before his military conscription, she has no choice but to enlist under his name to avoid getting her entire family executed. But hiding her identity won’t be so easy once Ignus takes note of her impressive sword skills and sets his sights on turning “Sir Celestine” into his top henchman. With the threat of execution looming over her head, can Selena avoid getting caught by the villain? (Source: Tappytoon)

title: Drawing: Saikyou Mangaka wa Oekaki Skill de Isekai Musou Suru!
titleRomaji: Drawing: Saikyou Mangaka wa Oekaki Skill de Isekai Musou Suru!
titleNative: ドローイング 最強漫画家はお絵かきスキルで異世界無双する！
synonyms: Drawing: The Greatest Mangaka Becomes A Skilled “Martial Artist” In Another World
synopsis: Akira Kamishiro was a very successful manga author, who was diagnosed with blood cancer one day. He regretted the way he lived, where he could only build up empty relationships. Angry at his mother for asking him to send her some money, he died in a car accident. He was given a chance to choose his new mother and reincarnate in another world. Akira, not wanting to have a repeat of his past life, decided to choose an ordinary but safe life.. He was reincarnated as Akira, the only son of a magic store, with his previous life's memories. He had no talent for swordsmanship or magic, but he didn't care as he was still loved by his family. At one point, he realized that he can embody various things by "drawing a picture". That's when he noticed his cheat ability...!? This is a story of Akira who wanted to live a mediocre life in another world and his adventures to protect his peaceful place!!
